media.caption: The evolution from logic to learning.

text.headline: A Journey Through AI & ML History
text.text: Tracing the path from foundational mathematics to modern deep learning.

media.caption: A brief explanation of the Turing Test.

text.headline: The Turing Test
text.text: Alan Turing publishes 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence,' proposing a test of a machine's ability to exhibit intelligent behavior.

text.headline: The Dartmouth Workshop
text.text: John McCarthy and others organize the conference where the term 'Artificial Intelligence' was officially coined.

text.headline: Deep Blue Defeats Kasparov
text.text: IBM's Deep Blue becomes the first computer system to defeat a reigning world chess champion in a match.

text.headline: The Deep Learning Explosion
text.text: AlexNet wins the ImageNet competition by a large margin, signaling the start of the modern deep learning era.
